_comment: Synthetic entity detection rules (v3, Section 26). All findings must include confidence (0–1). Never make definitive fraud claims. Update rules here — never in code.

fakeEntityPatterns.description: Entity claims authority but has no verifiable external presence
Author bio text appears word-for-word on multiple unrelated domains
Author entity has no external attribution history

aiAuthorityNetworkPatterns.description: Multiple sameAs links pointing to recently created external profiles
Citation network with abnormally high reciprocal link density

schemaManipulationPatterns.description: Schema claims aggregate review rating but no review content detected on page
datePublished schema value significantly earlier than content metadata
Author schema entity not mentioned anywhere in body text
speakable schema on page with no concise retrievable answers

citationFarmingPatterns.description: All factual claim citations point only to other pages on the same domain
Page gained 50+ specific facts in a single audit cycle

unnaturalClusteringPatterns.description: All entities on domain connected through one hub entity
Entity claims coverage of topics implausibly broad for its identity
